Ex6 - Soma unsigned de 192 bits
case=no-carry
  a   = 0x0000000000000030_0000000000000020_0000000000000010
  b   = 0x0000000000000003_0000000000000002_0000000000000001
  out = 0x0000000000000033_0000000000000022_0000000000000011
  exp = 0x0000000000000033_0000000000000022_0000000000000011
  carry=0 expected=0 => PASS
case=carry-low-mid
  a   = 0x0000000000000000_0000000000001234_ffffffffffffffff
  b   = 0x0000000000000000_0000000000000002_0000000000000001
  out = 0x0000000000000000_0000000000001237_0000000000000000
  exp = 0x0000000000000000_0000000000001237_0000000000000000
  carry=0 expected=0 => PASS
case=carry-through-high
  a   = 0x0000000000000000_ffffffffffffffff_ffffffffffffffff
  b   = 0x0000000000000000_0000000000000000_0000000000000001
  out = 0x0000000000000001_0000000000000000_0000000000000000
  exp = 0x0000000000000001_0000000000000000_0000000000000000
  carry=0 expected=0 => PASS
case=final-overflow
  a   = 0xffffffffffffffff_ffffffffffffffff_ffffffffffffffff
  b   = 0x0000000000000000_0000000000000000_0000000000000001
  out = 0x0000000000000000_0000000000000000_0000000000000000
  exp = 0x0000000000000000_0000000000000000_0000000000000000
  carry=1 expected=1 => PASS
STATUS FINAL: PASS
